welcome.title: 👋 Welcome to Zedi
welcome.p2: Unburden writing and the obligation to organize—let your thinking expand like the universe.
welcome.li2: Link small pages instead of one long note

links.title: 🔗 How to link
links.p1: In Zedi, create links with [[Page title]] syntax.
links.liInternal: Internal: points to an existing page
links.liGhost: Ghost: links to a page that does not exist yet (may be created later)
links.p2: Unlinked pages are “seeds waiting to sprout.” You don’t have to organize them yet.

capture.title: ✨ Capture your thoughts
capture.p1: When an idea appears, put it on a page right away.
capture.o1: Use the + button (bottom right) to create a new page quickly
capture.o2: The title is auto-generated—start from the body if you like
capture.o3: Aim to capture, not to perfect, at first
capture.quote: If a blank page scares you, write a single line first.
